# Krizaka — Orazaka

> Krizaka is a Québec startup building Orazaka, an open-source, sovereign
> **AI orchestration engine**. It runs multimodal inference (chat, image, video,
> voice) on a hexagonal architecture (Java 21, Spring Boot 4, Spring AI 2)
> enforced by ArchUnit, with a cognitive interceptor pipeline and Model Context
> Protocol (MCP) support. Everything runs on your own infrastructure — Law 25,
> GDPR and PIPEDA compliant by design: data never leaves your network.

## What it is

Orazaka is an AI orchestration engine: it takes a single request and routes it
through a deterministic or agentic pipeline of interceptors (security, RBAC,
context, RAG, tooling/MCP, validation, governance) to the optimal local model,
then returns the result. Self-hosted, open source, free.

## Editions

- Orazaka Community — the complete open-source engine, self-hosted, free forever.
- Packages — composable interceptor bundles that turn the engine into tailored
  business solutions (agencies, sales, legal, support, real estate, healthcare).
